patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='libs/shared/src/main/java/io/crate/common/collections/Maps.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['public static boolean pathExists(Map map, List path) {', 'Map current = map;', 'for (int i = 0; i < path.size(); i++) {', 'String key = path.get(i);', '// must use Map.containsKey instead of Map.get because a column can be mapped to a null value', 'if (!current.containsKey(key)) {', 'return false;', '}', 'if (i + 1 == path.size()) {', 'return true;', '}', 'var val = current.get(key);', 'if (val instanceof Map nested) {', 'current = nested;', '} else {', 'return false;', '}', '}', 'return true;', '}', '', '', '/**', '* Returns a modifiable deep copy of the given map.', '*/', 'public static Map deepCopy(Map map) {', 'Map copy = new HashMap<>();', 'for (Map.Entry e : map.entrySet()) {', 'K key = e.getKey();', 'V value = e.getValue();', 'if (value instanceof Map nested) {', 'copy.put(key, (V) deepCopy(nested));', '} else if (value instanceof List list) {', 'List
